title: Last-Mile AI Routing Platform
entry_mechanism: Saudi AI company developing last-mile routing platform anchored by Saudi Post and e-commerce growth
executive_summary:
Last-mile delivery routing — AI algorithms that determine optimal delivery sequences, route planning, driver assignment, and customer notification for same-day and next-day parcel delivery — is one of the most commercially valuable applications of AI in logistics. Saudi Arabia's e-commerce market grew 71% in 2020–2022 and is projected to reach $30 billion by 2028, creating massive last-mile delivery demand. Saudi Arabia's geography (spread-out cities, irregular addressing, new NEOM/giga-project developments) creates routing challenges that international platforms (Onfleet, Routific, Circuit) handle poorly.

Node LG-5 targets a Saudi-developed last-mile AI routing platform: algorithms trained on Saudi geographic data, Arabic addressing, and Saudi delivery patterns — outperforming foreign platforms on Saudi-specific routing challenges. The platform serves Saudi Post, Aramex Saudi Arabia, and Saudi e-commerce delivery companies.

The global last-mile delivery technology market was valued at $7.1 billion in 2024 growing at 26.8% CAGR. A Saudi routing platform with demonstrable Saudi performance advantage creates an immediately defensible market position and GCC export opportunity.

companies.name: Onfleet
companies.rationale: Onfleet provides delivery management and routing with API access for Saudi platform development.

companies.name: HERE Technologies
companies.rationale: HERE provides mapping and routing APIs with Saudi Arabia coverage and Arabic addressing support.

companies.name: Google Maps Platform
companies.rationale: Google Maps API provides Saudi geographic data for routing algorithm development.
companies.contact: Google VP Maps Platform, Middle East

companies.name: Bringg
companies.rationale: Bringg provides delivery orchestration and routing. Subject to normalisation.

companies.name: Samsara
companies.rationale: Samsara provides fleet telematics and routing for delivery operations.

partners.name: Saudi Post (SPL)
partners.current: National postal and parcel delivery; some routing technology
partners.upgrade: SPL as anchor customer; 50 million annual parcel routing on Saudi platform; SPL delivery data as training data for Saudi routing AI

partners.name: SDAIA / Saudi National Address
partners.current: National Address system; Wasel delivery address database
partners.upgrade: Saudi National Address API integration for routing platform; Arabic addressing standardisation; Saudi geospatial data as routing model input

partners.name: KAUST AI Research
partners.current: Operations research; combinatorial optimisation; vehicle routing problem research
partners.upgrade: Saudi routing AI research programme; Saudi-specific geographic constraints modelling; real-time traffic and demand prediction for Saudi cities

partners.name: Tamara / Saudi e-commerce ecosystem
partners.current: Saudi fintech and e-commerce payment infrastructure
partners.upgrade: Saudi e-commerce delivery routing platform; Tamara checkout integration with Saudi routing platform; combined payment-delivery-tracking Saudi e-commerce infrastructure
